title: Alan and the Fullness of Time
original_title: Alan and the Fullness of Time
overview: What does it mean to stand for what you believe in? Alan Wohlman, a boy sheltered by his mysterious parents and pursued by an ominous government agency, must grow up in a hurry. Aided by his parent's circle of believers, and the prayers of those who came before him, Alan steps into the dangerous beginning of his journey to help complete the Great Commission.
